data.plain_profile_summary: The submitted record documents 5 years of backend engineering experience across two roles, with a stated tenure of 3 years in the current Senior Backend Engineer position at a mid-size SaaS company and 2 years in a prior Backend Developer role at a startup. A BSc in Computer Science from the Technical University of Munich (2018) and an AWS Solutions Architect certification (2023) are on file. Technical skills listed include Python, Go, PostgreSQL, Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD pipelines. Language proficiency is stated as English (fluent) and German (B2). The current employer is not named in the submitted record. References are noted as available upon request but are not included in the submission.
